title: turnera pohliana
intro: Turnera pohliana, also known as the West Indian sarsaparilla or Turnera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Turnera pohliana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Turnera pohliana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
